_instructions: Remove all keys starting with underscore before using
expect_patterns: extract from real boot log — see observe_uart_boot_pattern_guide.md
duration_s: set to (boot_time_seconds + 5) minimum; 15 is safe for WiFi-enabled firmware
validate_network: delete section if firmware has no network interface
name: <BOARD_ID>_smoke

observe_uart._port_note: verify with: udevadm info /dev/ttyACM0 | grep ID_SERIAL_SHORT
observe_uart._usb_serial_note: MAC form, e.g. '3C:DC:75:5A:9A:FC' — from udevadm ID_SERIAL_SHORT
observe_uart._baud_note: null for USB CDC (native USB); set 115200 for UART bridge
observe_uart._duration_note: must exceed firmware boot time; increase if patterns are missed
_expect_patterns_note: Minimum 3 patterns covering different boot phases
Do NOT include: timestamps, memory addresses, IP addresses, version strings
observe_uart._rts_dtr_note: false for native-USB-only (Class B); true for bridge port (Class A)

validate_network._section_note: Delete this entire section if firmware has no network interface
_ip_pattern_note: Regex with one capture group — AEL substitutes into {{observed_ip}}
Adjust to match your firmware's IP log format:

checks._note: GDB server port — change or remove if not applicable
